properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am a new creation, no more in condemnation Here in the grace of God, I stand My heart is overflowing, my love just keeps on growing Here in the grace of God, I stand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I will praise you, Lord Yes I will praise you, Lord And I will sing for all that you have done

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A joy that knows no limit, A lightness in my spirit, Here in the grace of God I stand.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I love to be in Your presence With Your people singing praises; I love to stand and rejoice, Lift my hands and raise my voice.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You set my feet to dancing, You fill my heart with song, You give me reason to rejoice, Rejoice.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I love to be in Your presence With Your people singing praises; I love to stand and rejoice, I Lift my hands and raise my voice.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I Lift my hands, I Lift my hands, I Lift my hands, And raise my voice.
